authority: 【benchmark】任务案例模版.docx / 3.1 场景叙事具体内容
【benchmark 任务分布_模板】G2 环境感知 _ G3 机动飞行 .docx / capability JD mappings
purpose: This file defines generic template completeness only. It contains no case-specific values or finished case answers.
paragraph_sequence: workspace, platform envelope, route topology, and task objective
payload, business objects, observation process, and required outputs
external executor, control interface, positioning inputs, and observable flight state
each selected A×L responsibility, explicit non-responsibilities, and attribution boundaries
nominal window, disturbance or anomaly, protection behavior, and prohibited answer leakage
structured report or external decision loop, including what is not evaluated
task completion criteria and all remaining TBD items
generation_rules: Emit every required JD slot even when the value is unknown.
Unknown values use null, status TBD, and an empty evidence quote.
The natural-language template follows the seven-paragraph sequence.
Every required JD slot appears as a bracket annotation in the natural-language template.
Do not fill a TBD slot from a case example, prior answer, or general world knowledge.
Keep thresholds, business decisions, and simulator interfaces as TBD unless verbatim evidence exists.
